title: Living Document
description: Base schema for Archeia living documents — one file per concept, edited in place, history in git. Corresponds to semantic memory in the Tulving/CoALA taxonomy.

owner.description: The domain owner that writes this document (e.g., 'product-skills', 'codebase-skills').

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last content update (transaction time).

last_verified.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last time a writer confirmed this document's content against its source of truth. For consolidation outputs (e.g., architecture.md), this is the last consolidate operation. For human-authored living documents (e.g., vision.md), this is the last human sign-off. The gap between last_verified and now() is a staleness signal: a living document whose last_verified is months old is less trustworthy than one verified today. This is Archeia's minimum viable bi-temporal support (valid time proxy) — full bi-temporal modeling with valid_from/valid_until is a future extension.

skill.description: Optional: the skill that most recently wrote this file (for generated/regenerated docs).

skill_version.description: Optional: the skill version, for traceability of regenerated content.
